question_text: A liquid has which of the following properties?

options.label: B
options.text: Definite volume but not definite shape

options.label: C
options.text: Definite shape but not definite volume

options.label: D
options.text: Neither definite shape nor definite volume

explanation: Liquids have particles that are close together, giving them a definite volume, but can flow past each other, so they have no definite shape and take the shape of their container.
